text.title: growth-email-marketing Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for growth-email-marketing as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Sending to a purchased or cold list.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: High complaint rates trigger ISP blacklisting that can make the sending domain unusable for months.

failure-mode.description: No welcome sequence — sending nothing in the first 7 days after opt-in.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The first week is the highest-engagement window; missing it loses 40-60% of potential activation.

failure-mode.description: Inconsistent sending schedule — emailing only when there is something to promote.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Irregular emails erode trust and train subscribers to ignore them; a regular schedule builds expectation and open habit.
